name: Qwen 2.5 1.5B
description: Lightweight default — runs on any GPU. No HuggingFace token required.

name: Qwen 2.5 3B
description: Good balance of speed and quality. Fits on 8GB GPUs via vLLM.

name: Phi 3.5 Mini (3.8B)
description: Compact and fast. Surprisingly capable for its size.

name: Qwen 2.5 7B (AWQ 4-bit)
description: Best quality for 8GB GPUs. AWQ 4-bit quantized — fits where full 7B models can't.

name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B (AWQ 4-bit)
description: Purpose-built for code. AWQ quantized to fit on 8GB GPUs.

name: Mistral 7B (bf16)
description: Strong instruction following. Needs 16GB+ VRAM for vLLM (bf16). Ollama auto-quantizes.

name: Llama 3.2 3B
description: Fast and capable. Requires HuggingFace token + license acceptance.

name: Llama 3.1 8B (bf16)
description: High quality but needs 16GB+ VRAM for vLLM. Ollama auto-quantizes to fit smaller GPUs.

name: Qwen 2.5 7B (bf16)
description: Full precision 7B. Needs 16GB+ VRAM for vLLM. Use AWQ variant for 8GB GPUs.

name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B (bf16)
description: Full precision coding model. Needs 16GB+ VRAM for vLLM. Use AWQ variant for 8GB GPUs.

name: Llama 3.1 70B (AWQ 4-bit)
description: Frontier-class reasoning. Requires 40GB+ VRAM (A100/H100). Requires HuggingFace token.

name: Nomic Embed Text
description: High-quality text embeddings for semantic search.
